mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY NOTC.REG_DATE, NOTC.NOTICE_NUM) AS ROW_NUM , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_ICON , (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as REG_DATE , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ' ~ ' TO_CHAR(NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NOTICE_DATE , NOTC.BUYER_CD , NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.START_DATE , NOTC.END_DATE , NOTC.REG_USER_ID REG_USER_ID , GETUSERINFO(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS REG_USER_TYPE , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_ICON_IMAGE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.VIEW_TYPE FROM STOCNOTC NOTC WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = 'PCI' -- 납품게시판 AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND NOTC.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}
AND ( (NOTC.START_DATE >= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_TO_DATE})) OR (NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE <= (#{ADD_TO_DATE})) OR (NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_TO_DATE})) )
AND (NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_FROM_DATE}))
AND (NOTC.START_DATE <= (#{ADD_TO_DATE}) AND NOTC.END_DATE >= (#{ADD_TO_DATE}))
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REG_USER_NM}) '%'
AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE = #{VIEW_TYPE}
ORDER BY ROW_NUM DESC

SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM , NOTC.NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , NOTC.VIEW_TYPE , (NOTC.VIEW_CNT, 0) AS VIEW_CNT , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS START_DATE , (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS END_DATE , (NOTC.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(NOTC.GATE_CD, NOTC.REG_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , NOTC.REG_USER_ID , NOTC.ATT_FILE_NUM , NOTC.BUYER_CD , NOTV.VENDOR_CD , NOTV.VENDOR_NM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC LEFT JOIN ( SELECT NOTV.GATE_CD , NOTV.BUYER_CD , NOTV.DEPT_CD , NOTV.NOTICE_NUM , LISTAGG(NOTV.COMPANY_CD, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NOTV.COMPANY_CD) AS VENDOR_CD , LISTAGG(GETCOMPANYNAME(NOTV.GATE_CD, NOTV.COMPANY_CD, 'KO'), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY GETCOMPANYNAME(NOTV.GATE_CD, NOTV.COMPANY_CD, 'KO')) AS VENDOR_NM FROM STOCNOTV NOTV WHERE NOTV.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTV.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY NOTV.GATE_CD, NOTV.BUYER_CD, NOTV.DEPT_CD, NOTV.NOTICE_NUM) NOTV ON (NOTV.GATE_CD = NOTC.GATE_CD AND NOTV.BUYER_CD = NOTC.BUYER_CD AND NOTV.DEPT_CD = NOTC.DEPT_CD AND NOTV.NOTICE_NUM = NOTC.NOTICE_NUM) WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND NOTC.NOTICE_NUM = #{NOTICE_NUM}
